name: HWU Small Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter
desc: Small-diameter IoT ultrasonic water meter, DN15–DN40, R250/R400, picosecond chip, IP68, RS485/M-Bus/NB-IoT/LoRa/4G.
overview: The HWU Small-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter uses transit-time ultrasonic technology — no moving parts, no wear, long service life. Picosecond-resolution chips measure flow starting from near-zero rates. Stores 24 daily / 360 monthly / 192 hourly records. Real-time monitoring of battery, temperature, flow and pipe status alerts. Supports RS485 / M-Bus / NB-IoT / LoRa / 4G.

specs.label: Flow DN15 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 2.4 L/h; Transitional: 10 L/h; Max: 2,500 L/h; Overload: 3,125 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN20 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 4 L/h; Transitional: 16 L/h; Max: 4,000 L/h; Overload: 5,000 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN25 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 6.4 L/h; Transitional: 25 L/h; Max: 6,300 L/h; Overload: 7,875 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN32 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 10.2 L/h; Transitional: 40 L/h; Max: 10,000 L/h; Overload: 12,500 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN40 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 16 L/h; Transitional: 64 L/h; Max: 16,000 L/h; Overload: 20,000 L/h

features: Picosecond-precision ultrasonic chip: small start-up flow, wide measurement range, high accuracy — measures even drips
Fully sealed electronics: waterproof, moisture-proof, dust-proof, dirt-proof, sand-proof
Stores 24 monthly / 360 daily / 192 hourly records — no data loss on power failure
Real-time monitoring of battery, temperature, flow; alarms for low voltage, abnormal sensor, non-full pipe
Multi-protocol support: RS485 / M-Bus / NB-IoT / LoRa / 4G / TTL for centralised meter reading
Supports remote over-the-air firmware upgrade — adapts to future requirements without site visit
